unit.detail: F0 suite GREEN: 18 units in 1.4min (shared/tests 76s, all plugins). New: shared test_finalize_bundle 15 + test_finalize_bundle_cli 23 + idempotency additions to test_write_decision_drop/test_write_changelog_drop.

integration.detail: integration-tests unit GREEN; shared/tests test_finalize_bundle_integration 4 (real-subprocess composition, bundle==manual-sequence equivalence, whole-bundle retry, partial-failure recovery).

e2e.detail: F0.5 CLI surface: 4 tests via surface_verification.py --surface cli (the integration test spawns the real finalize_bundle.py process = the CLI surface).

behaviors.behavior: AC1: 5 sections -> 5 tools in dependency order F1->F3->F4->F5c->F5b, exit 0, every step ok
AC2/AC3: abort-on-first-failure names the step; F1 drift (stdout drift_detected) vs crash (unparseable) distinguished; F3/F4/F5c/F5b failures each named
F1 always-runs-unless-skip; custom + default ref passed through

AC4: payload validation fail-fast (missing/unknown top keys, empty/bad changelog, blank run_id, missing event_extras, unknown sub-object keys, iterate_entry forbidden run_id/date) before any subprocess
AC6/AC7: argv construction per step (F3 fields, optional flags omitted when absent, F5c entry-json, F5b reason+event-extras); N bullets -> N F4 invocations; same project_root to all
stdout capture: noisy child truncated, single valid JSON document emitted
internal error (subprocess spawn failure) -> ONE structured JSON doc, exit 3, never a bare traceback
main() exit codes 0/1/2 + payload IO errors (unreadable, invalid JSON, validation)
F5b signal surfacing: finalize_iterate per-step status (e.g. compliance skipped) lifted into steps.F5b.finalize_steps, not buried
AC-idem-tools: write_decision_drop + write_changelog_drop dedup on identical (run_id, content); first-run byte-identical; different content -> fresh counter
INTEGRATION (composition): bundle invokes the 5 REAL tools on disk and each writes its artifact with the payload content; W4 coverage.total preserved by F5b compliance regen

INTEGRATION (equivalence + retry): bundle output == manual 5-tool sequence (modulo event id/ts); whole-bundle retry idempotent; partial-failure (F5b FR-gate reject after F3/F4/F5c wrote) recovers on whole-bundle re-run with no dups
